hero.title: Natural Beauty, without the effort.
hero.lead: Meticulously crafted botanical replicas designed to elevate modern interiors. Experience the calming presence of nature without the maintenance.
collection.lead: A curated selection of premium artificial plants, meticulously crafted to bring nature's tranquility into your space. Our collection combines unrivaled botanical realism with the ease of maintenance-free living, designed to elevate every modern interior.

about.lead: 4EverPlants was born from a passion for interior design and the belief that greenery gives a space tranquility, character, and a well-cared-for look—even without direct sunlight or maintenance.
about.p1: Many artificial plants look cheap or unnatural. We select specifically based on refined leaf structures, true-to-nature trunks, and a matte finish. No mass plastic look, but a calm premium appearance that is right in every detail.
about.p2: From our studio in Amsterdam, we build a collection that matches today's interior requirements: sustainable, stylish, and maintenance-free.
about.p3: We see plants as an essential part of a balanced interior. They soften hard lines and bring life to a space. With high-quality artificial plants, we make that atmosphere accessible and predictable, regardless of the conditions or care.
about.p4: Because we believe in the right plant in the right place, we are happy to help you choose the scale and styling that fits your home or project. Personal service and an eye for detail are our central focus.
Experience the beauty of nature without: Experience the beauty of nature without the need for watering, sunlight, or maintenance.
Meticulously crafted with high-end mater: Meticulously crafted with high-end materials to be indistinguishable from the real thing.
Elevate your interior instantly with bot: Elevate your interior instantly with botanical statements that bring calm and character.
Sustainable investment with durable, col: Sustainable investment with durable, color-fast materials that last for years.
sustainability.p1: With us you choose high-quality artificial plants that are not only aesthetically attractive, but also a conscious and sustainable choice. Our plants are designed to last for years, without loss of quality or maintenance. So you prevent waste and do not have to purchase plants again and again.
sustainability.p2: Unlike many real plants from tropical regions, which often require a long journey and are sensitive to climate changes, our artificial plants will always remain in perfect condition. Real plants need regular replacement because they cannot survive the indoor climate — leading to additional transportation, packaging and CO2 emissions.
sustainability.p3: Our artificial plants offer a future-proof alternative. They last a long time, ensure fewer logistics movements and thus contribute to lower environmental impact. In addition, our plants do not contain plastic, which makes them an even more conscious choice within a sustainable lifestyle.
A smart choice for you and the world: A smart choice for you and the world
sustainability.p4: With our artificial plants you combine comfort, style and sustainability. You invest once in a product that will last for years — without waste, without maintenance and with minimal impact on the environment.

business.lead: For offices, restaurants, retail, and hospitality, 4EverPlants delivers lifelike solutions that contribute to a premium atmosphere without maintenance or replacement costs.
business.p1: Representative spaces without maintenance costs or loss of planting. Ideal for offices, catering, salons, showrooms and waiting areas. Consistent atmosphere in rooms with little daylight or fluctuating temperatures. Customized advice for size, styling, placement and combination with pots.
business.lead: 4EverPlants delivers lifelike botanical solutions that create a premium atmosphere — without the upkeep. From a single statement piece to a full interior concept.
business.p3: Create a warm and inviting atmosphere that gives guests a sense of calm and luxury immediately upon entering. Our greenery is maintenance-free and always at its best, even during long opening hours.
business.p4: Enrich the workplace with botanical accents that promote concentration and tranquility. Ideal for places where daylight is scarce or where traditional planting is not desirable.
business.usp_intro: A representative space doesn't require a maintenance contract. Our plants look perfect on day one — and on day 500.
business.feature_realism_p: Zero watering, pruning, or replacement. Your greenery budget is a one-time decision.
business.feature_maintenance_p: Low-light corridors, windowless offices, high-traffic lobbies — looks great everywhere.
business.feature_durability_p: We advise on size, species, placement, and pot combinations to match your brand.
business.feature_versatility_p: No wilting, no off-seasons. Consistent look whether it's a Monday morning or a gala.
business.ideal_footer: — where live plants simply aren't practical.
business.tab_offices_p: Enrich the workplace with botanical accents that promote focus and calm. Ideal for spaces with limited daylight or where live plants aren't suitable — open-plan floors, meeting rooms, reception desks, and server-adjacent areas.
business.tab_restaurants_p: Create a warm, inviting atmosphere that guests feel immediately upon entering. Our greenery is maintenance-free and always at its best, even during long opening hours or peak seasons. Perfect for restaurants, hotels, boutiques, and salons.
business.tab_retail_p: High-end showrooms need permanent, polished styling. Our plants frame product displays and create visual anchors without competing for attention or needing a dedicated maintenance budget.
business.tab_hospitality_p: A well-styled waiting area puts clients at ease before a meeting even starts. Greenery softens the environment, adds warmth, and consistently signals quality even if the space only gets natural light for half the day.
business.contact_lead: Send us your space details and we'll come back with a tailored proposal.

contact.lead: Do you have a question about a product, want styling advice, or need to submit a business request? We are happy to help you.
Choose how you'd like to connect: Choose how you'd like to connect
contact.form_intro: Whether it's a single statement plant for your living room or a full greenery concept for your business — we love to help you find the perfect match.
contact.faq_intro: Can't find your answer? Send us a message and we'll get back to you within 2 hours.
support.lead: Find everything you need — from delivery times and returns to product care and safety information.
support.returns_cooling: You have the right to cancel your order within 14 days of receipt, no questions asked. After cancellation, you have an additional 14 days to return the product.
support.return_costs: Return shipping is at your own expense, unless the product arrived damaged or was incorrectly delivered. In that case, we cover the costs.
support.refund: Your refund will be processed within 14 days after we receive the return, via the same payment method you used.
support.damaged_tip: Received a damaged product? Send us an email with a photo of the damage within 48 hours. We'll arrange a replacement or full refund immediately.
support.warranty_note: Normal wear from prolonged direct sunlight exposure (UV fading) is not covered under warranty. We recommend placing plants away from direct, intense sunlight for the longest lifespan.
support.care_dust: Use a soft cloth, feather duster, or compressed air to gently remove dust from leaves and branches. Do this every 2–4 weeks for the best appearance.
support.care_clean: For a thorough refresh, wipe leaves with a slightly damp microfiber cloth. Avoid harsh chemicals or abrasive cleaning agents.
support.care_place: Place your plant away from prolonged direct sunlight to preserve color vibrancy. Our plants are suitable for any indoor environment, including rooms with no natural light.
support.care_reshape: After unpacking or moving, gently fan out branches and adjust leaves to restore the natural, full volume. Most stems are flexible and will hold their shape.
support.safety_pets: All our plants are made from non-toxic materials. They are safe for cats, dogs, and other pets. No risk of poisoning if chewed or played with.
support.safety_children: Our products contain no small detachable parts that pose a choking hazard. The weighted bases ensure stability, preventing tipping.
support.safety_allergy: Zero pollen, zero fragrance, zero allergens. Our plants are ideal for people with hay fever, asthma, or other allergies. Perfect for hospitals, care facilities, and sensitive environments.
support.safety_fire: Our plants are manufactured with fire-retardant materials. While not fireproof, they meet standard indoor safety requirements for residential and commercial spaces.
support.contact_lead: Can't find what you're looking for? Our team is ready to help with any question — from styling advice to warranty claims.
